subtasks.description: Query Salesforce data warehouse to retrieve licensed seat count, actual seat assignments, and utilization metrics (login frequency, last login date) by user/role/department

Analyze seat utilization results to identify inactive/unutilized licenses, calculate utilization rates, and classify seats by activity level (active, dormant, unused). Generate recommendations for license optimization

plan.cost_rationale: 2 subtasks required. First, sql_gen (mid tier) to aggregate licensed seat counts vs actual assignments with activity metrics from Salesforce warehouse—mid tier needed for multi-table joins across user licenses, assignment history, and login audit tables. Second, cross_recon (mid tier) to reconcile licensed vs assigned counts, classify utilization status, and produce actionable recommendations. Not marked as frontier because standard join/aggregation patterns and straightforward activity classification suffice. No separate policy_action needed—utilization analysis and optimization recommendations are part of the reconciliation workflow.

output.sql: SELECT c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment as department, COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) as actual_seat_assignments, SUM(cf.daily_active_seats) as licensed_seat_count, ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT cf.user_id) / NULLIF(SUM(cf.daily_active_seats), 0), 2) as utilization_percentage, MAX(alf.access_time) as last_login_date, COUNT(DISTINCT alf.log_id) as login_frequency FROM customer c LEFT JOIN consumption_facts cf ON c.c_custkey = cf.license_id LEFT JOIN access_log_facts alf ON cf.user_id = alf.user_id WHERE cf.event_date >= '2024-01-01' OR alf.access_time >= '2024-01-01'::timestamp GROUP BY c.c_custkey, c.c_name, c.c_mktsegment ORDER BY utilization_percentage ASC

active.criteria: utilization >= 75% AND login_frequency > 0 AND last_login_date within 7 days

dormant.criteria: utilization 25-74% OR (last_login_date 8-90 days ago AND activity_count_30d = 0)

unused.criteria: utilization < 25% OR last_login_date > 90 days ago OR login_frequency = 0

no_recent_activity.criteria: licensed_seat assigned but no login_frequency in observation period

reconciled.message: SQL query provides historical seat assignment and login metrics. Awaiting MongoDB operational state (real-time seat allocation and recent activity logs) to perform LEFT JOIN reconciliation with MongoDB as primary source.
